'''R4-J9''' was an [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4 astromech droid]], one of three [[Droid/Legends|droids]] assigned to a droid pool that included [[R4-S2]], which managed to survive the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leki]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] crash and repair itself in [[90 BBY/Legends|90 BBY]]. The unit and R4-S2 went on to work for the [[Administrative droid/Legends|administrative droid]], [[QS-2D]]. Both agromech droids surveyed [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] deposits on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Uffel]] and set up [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations to obtain raw materials to manufacture droids.
